title: The James Webb Space Telescope peered into one of the universe's oldest galaxy clusters, and scientists can't explain what they saw - Space
summary_full: The James Webb Space Telescope peered into one of the universe's oldest galaxy clusters, and scientists can't explain what they saw  SpaceThe James Webb Space Telescope found a spiral galaxy, nicknamed the Big Wheel, that existed just two billion years after the Big Bang — five times more massive than the Milky Way, with a spiral structure our models say couldn't have survived that early  Space DailyThe JWST Spies Six Galaxies Becoming One  Universe TodayJames Webb spots the birth of a giant galaxy and a supermassive black hole  Universiteit LeidenJWST found a galaxy cluster 10 billion years old that shouldn’t be this dense  Martin Cid Magazine
